title: Front Office Manager - Yum! Brands India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Yum! Brands India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Yum! Brands India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yum! Brands India:
Yum! Brands India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India!
